name: Snow Covered Almond Crescents
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon almond extract -or- 2 teaspoons vanilla extract
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Beat margarine with powdered sugar and almond extract until fluffy.
Add flour and salt; mix until well blended. Stir in oats and almonds. Using level measuring tablespoons, shape dough into crescents. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet for 14 to 17 minutes or until bottoms are light golden brown. Remove to a wire rack.
Sift remaining powdered sugar generously over warm cookies. Cool completely. Store tightly covered.
